Item.name: DynamicFreeInitial
Item.description: DynamicFreeInitial -- Dynamic balance, Initial guess value

Item.name: FixedInitial
Item.description: FixedInitial -- Dynamic balance, Initial value fixed

Item.name: SteadyStateInitial
Item.description: SteadyStateInitial -- Dynamic balance, Steady state initial with guess value

Item.name: SteadyState
Item.description: SteadyState -- Steady state balance, Initial guess value

Item.name: Bidirectional
Item.description: No restrictions on fluid flow (flow reversal possible)

ScalarVariable.name: MM
ScalarVariable.description: Molar mass of the trace substance

ScalarVariable.name: MMBul
ScalarVariable.description: Molar mass of bulk medium

ScalarVariable.name: MMFraction
ScalarVariable.description: Molar mass of the medium divided by the molar mass of the trace substance

ScalarVariable.name: coeff
ScalarVariable.description: Conversion from mass fraction to ppm

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.MM
ScalarVariable.description: Molar mass of the trace substance

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.MMBul
ScalarVariable.description: Molar mass of bulk medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.MMFraction
ScalarVariable.description: Molar mass of the medium divided by the molar mass of the trace substance

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.coeff
ScalarVariable.description: Conversion from mass fraction to ppm

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Cap_air.C
ScalarVariable.description: Heat capacity of element (= cp*m)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Cap_air.T
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of element

ScalarVariable.name: der(r2C2_1.Cap_air.T)
ScalarVariable.description: der(Temperature of element)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Cap_air.der_T
ScalarVariable.description: Time derivative of temperature (= der(T))

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Cap_air.port.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Cap_air.port.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.prescribedHeatFlow2.T_ref
ScalarVariable.description: Reference temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.prescribedHeatFlow2.alpha
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature coefficient of heat flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.prescribedHeatFlow2.port.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.prescribedHeatFlow2.port.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.temperatureSensor.T
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute temperature as output signal

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.temperatureSensor.port.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.temperatureSensor.port.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.g_int.k
ScalarVariable.description: Gain value multiplied with input signal

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.g_int.u
ScalarVariable.description: Input signal connector

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.g_int.y
ScalarVariable.description: Output signal connector

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.energyDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of energy balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.massDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of mass balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state, must be steady state if energyDynamics is steady state

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.substanceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of independent mass fraction balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.traceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of trace substance balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.p_start
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of pressure

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.T_start
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.X_start[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of mass fractions m_i/m

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.X_start[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of mass fractions m_i/m

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.C_start[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of trace substances

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.C_nominal[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal value of trace substances. (Set to typical order of magnitude.)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.mSenFac
ScalarVariable.description: Factor for scaling the sensible thermal mass of the volume

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.wrongEnergyMassBalanceConfiguration
ScalarVariable.description: True if configuration of energy and mass balance is wrong.

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.prescribedHeatFlowRate
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true if the model has a prescribed heat flow at its heatPort. If the heat flow rate at the heatPort is only based on temperature difference, then set to false

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.simplify_mWat_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to cause port_a.m_flow + port_b.m_flow = 0 even if mWat_flow is non-zero

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.m_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.nPorts
ScalarVariable.description: Number of ports

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal. Used only if model has two ports.

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.ports[1].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.ports[1].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.ports[1].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.ports[1].Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.ports[1].C_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Properties c_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.ports[2].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.ports[2].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.ports[2].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.ports[2].Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.ports[2].C_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Properties c_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.ports[3].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.ports[3].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.ports[3].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.ports[3].Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.ports[3].C_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Properties c_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.T
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of the fluid

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.U
ScalarVariable.description: Internal energy of the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.p
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure of the fluid

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.m
ScalarVariable.description: Mass of the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.Xi[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Species concentration of the fluid

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.mXi[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Species mass of the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.C[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Trace substance mixture content

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.mC[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Trace substance mass of the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.rho_start
ScalarVariable.description: Density, used to compute start and guess values

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.state_default.p
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute pressure of medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.state_default.T
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.state_default.X[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Mass fractions (= (component mass)/total mass m_i/m)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.state_default.X[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Mass fractions (= (component mass)/total mass m_i/m)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.rho_default
ScalarVariable.description: Density, used to compute fluid mass

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.state_start.p
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute pressure of medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.state_start.T
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.state_start.X[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Mass fractions (= (component mass)/total mass m_i/m)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.state_start.X[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Mass fractions (= (component mass)/total mass m_i/m)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.useSteadyStateTwoPort
ScalarVariable.description: Flag, true if the model has two ports only and uses a steady state balance

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.hOut_internal
ScalarVariable.description: Internal connector for leaving temperature of the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.XiOut_internal[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Internal connector for leaving species concentration of the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.COut_internal[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Internal connector for leaving trace substances of the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.preTem.port.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.preTem.port.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.portT.y
ScalarVariable.description: Value of Real output

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.heaFloSen.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow from port_a to port_b as output signal

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.heaFloSen.port_a.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.heaFloSen.port_a.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.heaFloSen.port_b.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.heaFloSen.port_b.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.use_C_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to enable input connector for trace substance

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.heatPort.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.heatPort.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.C_flow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Trace substance mass flow rate added to the medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.energyDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of energy balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.massDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of mass balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state, must be steady state if energyDynamics is steady state

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.substanceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of independent mass fraction balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.traceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of trace substance balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.p_start
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of pressure

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.T_start
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.X_start[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of mass fractions m_i/m

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.X_start[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of mass fractions m_i/m

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.C_start[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of trace substances

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.C_nominal[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal value of trace substances. (Set to typical order of magnitude.)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.mSenFac
ScalarVariable.description: Factor for scaling the sensible thermal mass of the volume

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.wrongEnergyMassBalanceConfiguration
ScalarVariable.description: True if configuration of energy and mass balance is wrong.

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.simplify_mWat_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to cause port_a.m_flow + port_b.m_flow = 0 even if mWat_flow is non-zero. Used only if Medium.nX > 1

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.nPorts
ScalarVariable.description: Number of ports

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.use_mWat_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to enable input connector for moisture mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.use_C_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to enable input connector for trace substance

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Sensible plus latent heat flow rate transferred into the medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.C_flow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Trace substance mass flow rate added to the medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.hOut
ScalarVariable.description: Leaving specific enthalpy of the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.XiOut[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Leaving species concentration of the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.COut[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Leaving trace substances of the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.UOut
ScalarVariable.description: Internal energy of the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.mXiOut[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Species mass of the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.mOut
ScalarVariable.description: Mass of the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.mCOut[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Trace substance mass of the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.ports[1].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.ports[1].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.ports[1].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.ports[1].Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.ports[1].C_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Properties c_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.ports[2].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.ports[2].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.ports[2].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.ports[2].Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.ports[2].C_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Properties c_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.ports[3].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.ports[3].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.ports[3].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.ports[3].Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.ports[3].C_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Properties c_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.preferredMediumStates
ScalarVariable.description: = true if StateSelect.prefer shall be used for the independent property variables of the medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.standardOrderComponents
ScalarVariable.description: If true, and reducedX = true, the last element of X will be computed from the other ones

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.p
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute pressure of medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.Xi[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Structurally independent mass fractions

ScalarVariable.name: der(r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.Xi[1])
ScalarVariable.description: der(Structurally independent mass fractions)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.h
ScalarVariable.description: Specific enthalpy of medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.d
ScalarVariable.description: Density of medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.T
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.X[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Mass fractions (= (component mass)/total mass m_i/m)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.X[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Mass fractions (= (component mass)/total mass m_i/m)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.u
ScalarVariable.description: Specific internal energy of medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.R_s
ScalarVariable.description: Gas constant (of mixture if applicable)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.MM
ScalarVariable.description: Molar mass (of mixture or single fluid)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.state.p
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute pressure of medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.state.T
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.state.X[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Mass fractions (= (component mass)/total mass m_i/m)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.state.X[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Mass fractions (= (component mass)/total mass m_i/m)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.T_degC
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of medium in [degC]

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.p_bar
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute pressure of medium in [bar]

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.medium.dT
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature difference used to compute enthalpy

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.U
ScalarVariable.description: Internal energy of fluid

ScalarVariable.name: der(r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.U)
ScalarVariable.description: der(Internal energy of fluid)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.m
ScalarVariable.description: Mass of fluid

ScalarVariable.name: der(r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.m)
ScalarVariable.description: der(Mass of fluid)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.mXi[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Masses of independent components in the fluid

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.mC[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Masses of trace substances in the fluid

ScalarVariable.name: der(r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.mC[1])
ScalarVariable.description: der(Masses of trace substances in the fluid)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.C[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Trace substance mixture content

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.mb_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flows across boundaries

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.mbXi_flow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Substance mass flows across boundaries

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.mbC_flow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Trace substance mass flows across boundaries

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.Hb_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Enthalpy flow across boundaries or energy source/sink

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.CSen
ScalarVariable.description: Aditional heat capacity for implementing mFactor

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.cp_default
ScalarVariable.description: Heat capacity, to compute additional dry mass

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.rho_start
ScalarVariable.description: Density, used to compute fluid mass

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.state_default.p
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute pressure of medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.state_default.T
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.state_default.X[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Mass fractions (= (component mass)/total mass m_i/m)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.state_default.X[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Mass fractions (= (component mass)/total mass m_i/m)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.rho_default
ScalarVariable.description: Density, used to compute fluid mass

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.s[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Vector with zero everywhere except where species is

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.hStart
ScalarVariable.description: Start value for specific enthalpy

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal._simplify_mWat_flow
ScalarVariable.description: If true, then port_a.m_flow + port_b.m_flow = 0 even if mWat_flow is non-zero, and equations are simplified

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.mWat_flow_internal
ScalarVariable.description: Needed to connect to conditional connector

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.vol.dynBal.C_flow_internal[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Needed to connect to conditional connector

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.m_air_inlet.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.m_air_inlet.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.m_air_inlet.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: der(r2C2_1.m_air_inlet.h_outflow)
ScalarVariable.description: der(Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.m_air_inlet.Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.m_air_inlet.C_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Properties c_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.m_air_outlet.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.m_air_outlet.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.m_air_outlet.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.m_air_outlet.Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.m_air_outlet.C_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Properties c_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.g_int1.k
ScalarVariable.description: Gain value multiplied with input signal

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.g_int1.u
ScalarVariable.description: Input signal connector

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.g_int1.y
ScalarVariable.description: Output signal connector

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.senCO2.port.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.senCO2.port.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.senCO2.port.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.senCO2.port.Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.senCO2.port.C_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Properties c_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.senCO2.MM
ScalarVariable.description: Molar mass of the trace substance

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.senCO2.ppm
ScalarVariable.description: Trace substance in port medium in ppm

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.senCO2.s[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Vector with zero everywhere except where species is

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.senCO2.MMBul
ScalarVariable.description: Molar mass of bulk medium

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.senCO2.MMFraction
ScalarVariable.description: Molar mass of the medium divided by the molar mass of the trace substance

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.senCO2.coeff
ScalarVariable.description: Conversion from mass fraction to ppm

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.prescribedTemperature1.port.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.prescribedTemperature1.port.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res3.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate from port_a -> port_b

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res3.dT
ScalarVariable.description: port_a.T - port_b.T

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res3.port_a.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res3.port_a.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res3.port_b.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res3.port_b.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res3.R
ScalarVariable.description: Constant thermal resistance of material

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Cap_wall_int.C
ScalarVariable.description: Heat capacity of element (= cp*m)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Cap_wall_int.T
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of element

ScalarVariable.name: der(r2C2_1.Cap_wall_int.T)
ScalarVariable.description: der(Temperature of element)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Cap_wall_int.der_T
ScalarVariable.description: Time derivative of temperature (= der(T))

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Cap_wall_int.port.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Cap_wall_int.port.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate from port_a -> port_b

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res4.dT
ScalarVariable.description: port_a.T - port_b.T

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res4.port_a.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res4.port_a.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res4.port_b.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res4.R
ScalarVariable.description: Constant thermal resistance of material

ScalarVariable.description: Constant thermal resistance of material

ScalarVariable.description: Heat capacity of element (= cp*m)

ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of element

ScalarVariable.name: der(r2C2_1.Cap_wall_boundary.T)
ScalarVariable.description: der(Temperature of element)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Cap_wall_boundary.der_T
ScalarVariable.description: Time derivative of temperature (= der(T))

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Cap_wall_boundary.port.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Cap_wall_boundary.port.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res7.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate from port_a -> port_b

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res7.dT
ScalarVariable.description: port_a.T - port_b.T

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res7.port_a.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res7.port_a.Q_flow

ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: r2C2_1.Res7.R
ScalarVariable.description: Constant thermal resistance of material

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.nPorts
ScalarVariable.description: Number of ports

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.verifyInputs
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to stop the simulation with an error if the medium temperature is outside its allowable range

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.ports[1].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.ports[1].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.ports[1].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.ports[1].Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.ports[1].C_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Properties c_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.flowDirection
ScalarVariable.description: Allowed flow direction

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.p_in_internal
ScalarVariable.description: Needed to connect to conditional connector

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.Xi_in_internal[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Needed to connect to conditional connector

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.X_in_internal[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Needed to connect to conditional connector

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.X_in_internal[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Needed to connect to conditional connector

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.C_in_internal[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Needed to connect to conditional connector

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.X[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Fixed value of composition

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.X[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Fixed value of composition

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.C[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Fixed values of trace substances

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.C_in[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Prescribed boundary trace substances

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Fixed mass flow rate going out of the fluid port

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.T
ScalarVariable.description: Fixed value of temperature

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.m_flow_in
ScalarVariable.description: Prescribed mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.T_in
ScalarVariable.description: Prescribed boundary temperature

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.m_flow_in_internal
ScalarVariable.description: Needed to connect to conditional connector

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.T_in_internal
ScalarVariable.description: Needed to connect to conditional connector

ScalarVariable.name: air_source.h_internal
ScalarVariable.description: Internal connector for enthalpy

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.nPorts
ScalarVariable.description: Number of ports

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.verifyInputs
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to stop the simulation with an error if the medium temperature is outside its allowable range

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.ports[1].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.ports[1].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.ports[1].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.ports[1].Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.ports[1].C_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Properties c_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.flowDirection
ScalarVariable.description: Allowed flow direction

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.p_in_internal
ScalarVariable.description: Needed to connect to conditional connector

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.Xi_in_internal[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Needed to connect to conditional connector

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.X_in_internal[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Needed to connect to conditional connector

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.X_in_internal[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Needed to connect to conditional connector

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.C_in_internal[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Needed to connect to conditional connector

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.X[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Fixed value of composition

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.X[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Fixed value of composition

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.C[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Fixed values of trace substances

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.p
ScalarVariable.description: Fixed value of pressure

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.T
ScalarVariable.description: Fixed value of temperature

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.checkWaterPressure
ScalarVariable.description: Evaluates to true if the pressure should be checked

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.checkAirPressure
ScalarVariable.description: Evaluates to true if the pressure should be checked

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.T_in_internal
ScalarVariable.description: Needed to connect to conditional connector

ScalarVariable.name: air_boundary.h_internal
ScalarVariable.description: Internal connector for enthalpy

ScalarVariable.name: ppm2concentration.k
ScalarVariable.description: Gain value multiplied with input signal

ScalarVariable.name: ppm2concentration.u
ScalarVariable.description: Input signal connector

ScalarVariable.name: ppm2concentration.y
ScalarVariable.description: Output signal connector

Unknown.dependenciesKind: dependent dependent fixed fixed fixed dependent fixed
dependent dependent dependent dependent dependent dependent dependent
dependent dependent dependent dependent dependent dependent dependent dependent dependent dependent
